famous quote:
A flower does not think of competing to the flower next to it. It just blooms. 
-Zen Shin
Interview Text:
Samuel G.

(part 2)

Then he says that he told God, if you want to tell me about what's going on with people, I want to use that minister to them. So he tells a story about seeing one of his other artist friends and he felt that she feels like her life is falling apart. 

So if it's a 50% choice whether I'm wrong and make a fool of myself or I get to help this person, this is a pretty good gamble. 

He went up to her and said, I feel like maybe everything has fallen apart recently in your life and God wants you to know it will be okay. She also burst into tears and said, "You're exactly right. But I can't go back to Christianity. I've been burned." Samuel replied, "You don't have to go back to Christianity. Just go back to Christ." And it changed the trajectory of her life.

When I'm willing to look crazy, things get more fun.
Music Video Instructions: When battling demons and struggling to find light, trust in the mysterious hand moving behind the scenes.
